subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! I am verily Thy handmaiden and the daughter of Thy handmaiden. Unto Thee have I turned, detached from aught else beside Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم لامه من امائه التی فازت بایام الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
